id.description: The unique identifier of the local gateway virtual interface.

local_address.description: The local IP address of the virtual interface.

local_bgp_asn.description: The local BGP Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the virtual interface.

local_gateway_id.description: The ID of the local gateway associated with the virtual interface.

local_gateway_virtual_interface_ids.description: A set of IDs for the local gateway virtual interfaces.

peer_address.description: The peer IP address of the virtual interface.

peer_bgp_asn.description: The peer BGP Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the virtual interface.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the virtual interface.

vlan.description: The VLAN ID associated with the virtual interface.
